content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Dungeon". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1463/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n, the number of rooms. The second line contains n integers, the health of each room.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum health required to survive.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the minimum health required to survive by summing up the negative health values and adding 1 if the sum is negative.

code.Python3:
t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    sum = 0
    for x in map(int, input().split()):
        if x < 0: sum += -x
    print(sum + 1)
